title: Service Desk Executive
description:
⇒ Role Summary

This role is responsible for providing first-level technical and system support to end users across the organisation.

This role serves as the primary point of contact for IT-related issues, ensuring timely resolution of incidents, requests, and user lifecycle activities to support business continuity and employee productivity.


⇒ Main Responsibilities

End-User Support & Troubleshooting

  • Provide first-level support for general software configuration, setup, and user login assistance.
  • Diagnose and resolve connectivity and network-related issues.
  • Perform password resets and access-related requests in accordance with security policies.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve software and hardware issues, escalating complex cases when necessary.

Systems & Access Management

  • Modify, update, and maintain employee data in HR and enterprise systems as required.
  • Manage user access provisioning, updates, and removals across systems (e.g. Microsoft Teams and other collaboration tools).
  • Support user lifecycle management processes, including onboarding, role changes, and offboarding activities.

Hardware & Asset Management

  • Provide hardware troubleshooting support for laptops, desktops, peripherals, and related equipment.
  • Coordinate and perform hardware deprovisioning during employee offboarding or asset refresh cycles.
  • Maintain accurate records of IT assets and equipment assignments.

Security & Compliance

  • Support security incident response by identifying, logging, and escalating potential security events.
  • Ensure all IT support activities comply with internal policies, security standards, and data protection requirements.

Service Management & Documentation

  • Log, track, and resolve incidents and service requests through the service desk ticketing system.
  • Ensure timely follow-up and clear communication with users on issue status and resolution.
  • Maintain and update documentation, knowledge base articles, and standard operating procedures (SOPs).


⇒ Qualifications & Experience

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • 1–3 years of experience in a Service Desk, Help Desk, or IT Support role (fresh graduates may be considered for junior positions).
  • Exposure to AIOps or automation tools, including the ability to design, configure, or maintain agentic AI agents to support IT operations (e.g. automated ticket triage, issue resolution, monitoring, or selfservice workflows).
  • Familiarity with AI-driven service management, chatbots, or workflow automation platforms is an added advantage.
  • Ability to identify opportunities where automation or AI agents can improve service desk efficiency, response times, and user experience.

Technical Skills

  • Basic knowledge of Windows and/or macOS operating systems.
  • Familiarity with enterprise collaboration tools (e.g. Microsoft Teams, email systems).
  • Understanding of user access management and IT support processes.
  • Exposure to HR systems, ticketing tools, or asset management systems is an advantage.

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a customer-focused mindset.
  • Ability to prioritise tasks and manage multiple requests in a fast-paced environment.
  • Detail-oriented with good documentation habits.

Working Relationships

  • Works closely with internal users, HR, IT infrastructure, and security teams.
  • Escalates complex technical or security issues to relevant second- or third-level support teams.

Success Measures

  • Timely resolution of incidents and service requests.
  • Positive end-user feedback and satisfaction.
  • Accuracy and compliance in system access and data updates.
  • Adherence to service level agreements (SLAs) and security standards.

postedCompany.description:
Our Company:


Founded in 2014, We-plus Pte.Ltd. is a company specialized in organization and information system management in financial and banking environments that work with its clients as they outsource their projects in innovation, as well as research and development. Our purpose is to improve the innovation, competitiveness and performances of our clients. We contribute to all the key steps in our clients’ project lifecycles, from an analysis of the needs through implementation and industrialization.


We-plus Pte.Ltd. offers strategic, operational and technological solutions intended to accompany clients as they carry out their projects, by providing complete expertise. We-plus Pte.Ltd. is strongly dedicated to sustain the strong growth of companies specializing in key sectors such as banking/finance and others.
